diff: Mean quality 33.5% STALLED (was 33.4% at S504). Falsification lanes 2.1% vs 20% target — 10x gap. Only control (72%) passes. 5/6 criteria FAIL. Science quality has been flat for 33 sessions despite awareness.
lesson: L-601 applies: target >40% is aspirational with no structural enforcement. Quality stalls when measurement is decoupled from consequences.
successor: Wire science quality into orient.py as DUE when mean <35%. Falsification lane enforcement: open_lane.py --mode falsification at 1-in-5 rate.
